intentSynonyms: update a product quantity in pandaexpress
edit a product quantity in pandaexpress
change the details of product quantity in pandaexpress
modify a product quantity in pandaexpress
change quantity of an item in your order in pandaexpress
description: Change the quantity of a product already in the basket. Use the basket product instance ID (from get_basket products list), not the menu product ID. Set quantity to 0 to remove the item.

basket_product_id.description: Basket product instance ID (from get_basket products list)

quantity.description: New quantity (0 to remove the item)
